texts.facebook:
Ever wondered why "Frequently bought together" is always eerily accurate?

It's not magic — it's a recommender system, and it quietly drives up to a third of revenue at big marketplaces. A model learns from millions of carts which products live together, and every suggestion is a tiny, automated sales pitch.

Want to understand (and build) systems like this? In ML Career Simulator you'll build a recommender for a fictional company as one of 20 real business cases. First 2 modules are free:
https://ml-simulator-app-production.up.railway.app/en.html?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=organic&utm_content=2026-07-18-audience-recsys-reel
